summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration-12 Raw Data Reports (5 reports + drill + narrative + export). 22 backend pytest cases all PASSED including the critical month/tier/city/state/zone grouping bug fix verification. Frontend UI tabs, column picker, narrative position, filters, drill modal, and grouped-header all functional. Two items need a re-look by the main agent: (a) export menu options (export-csv/xlsx/pdf) were not detected after a single click on [data-testid='report-export'] — likely a click-outside toggle race; (b) when switching group_by radios the table briefly continues showing stale location-grouped rows during the 250ms debounce + API roundtrip — UX is fine but tests must wait ≥4-5s.

ui_bugs.issue: [data-testid='export-csv|xlsx|pdf'] not found in DOM after clicking [data-testid='report-export']. Code in _shared.jsx:286 confirms the elements exist — likely a click-outside listener immediately closes the menu after the test click. Manually verifying with mouse hover/click should work. Recommend adding a small delay before the closing handler or use Radix Popover.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking group-month/group-tier the table briefly shows STALE location-grouped rows during the 250ms debounce + API call. Backend returns correct month/tier data (verified). UI should show a loading skeleton or clear the table to prevent the 'month filter not working' perception that the user reported.

action_items: Optional: clear table rows OR render an explicit loading-skeleton when group_by changes so user immediately sees the table 'reacting' to the radio click (root cause of the user-reported 'month filter not working' complaint — the backend works; it's the perceived UX latency).
Investigate ExportMenu click-outside behaviour: data-testid='export-csv/xlsx/pdf' children are not detectable post-click in headless automation.
critical_code_review_comments: raw_reports_routes.py is 963 lines — at the upper limit; consider splitting per-report into raw_reports/{customer,transaction,repeat,earn_redeem,visit}.py before adding more reports.
drill() in raw_reports_routes.py:683 — body.group_key is required but pydantic model has no validation min_length=1; an empty string falls through to all-store match silently.
earn_redeem expired-points pro-ration uses group's redemption share — best-effort; should be documented in UI tooltip so analysts don't treat as exact.
Repeat Purchases pipeline iterates per-mobile×location in Python (raw_reports_routes.py:421-478) — fine for current dataset but will need a Mongo $reduce / $facet path for >100k customers.
No XSS escaping on filename in Content-Disposition — re.sub strips most but allow-list approach safer.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing KAZO seed (41 customers, 9 stores, transactions across months).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend (POST /api/raw-reports/*) is solid — all 22 cases pass. The historical bill_date $dateToString bug is verified fixed via $cond+$substr. UI: tabs, column-picker (10 toggles, 7 default visible), narrative at bottom (ncTop 1254 > tblTop 874), drill-modal opens, Tier/Location filters present on customers-by-visit, Repeat Purchases grouped header checkbox works. Two minor frontend items to verify manually: (a) export menu items render on click — Playwright headless run found them missing, likely test-only issue; (b) when user clicks group_by radio, table briefly shows stale rows during ~250-1500ms refetch — backend returns correct data but UX should show loading skeleton. No P1 bugs found.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. The earlier user-reported 'month filter shows store data' was caused by a backend $dateToString failure on string-stored bill_date; the new $cond+$substr fallback (raw_reports_routes.py:62-77) now correctly emits YYYY-MM keys (verified by test_customer_data_month_differs_from_location).
